data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for granting permissions at various levels.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement to grant permissions at the business, location, or scoped subject level. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this requirement has been satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for scoped permissions but lacks specific evidence to demonstrate that the requirement is met, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence confirming the granting of permissions at biz, location, or scoped subject level.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
